_meta.note: Source-of-truth for which Figma library a component/token/icon must come from. The agent resolves component & variable sourcing through this registry. libraryKey values are real (from get_libraries on file uI6oKmJ0qDhsEuE0nFah2W).

core-components.displayName: DB UX DS v3 - Core Components - v4.13.0
core-components.usage: Primary source for all UI components (Button, Card, Tag, Input, Navigation, Notification, ...). Always prefer this library.

core-lab.displayName: DB UX DS v3 - Core Lab
core-lab.confirmationPrompt: Möchtest du auch Concept Components (Core Lab) nutzen? Diese sind noch nicht im Code verfügbar.
core-lab.usage: Concept / pre-release components NOT yet available in code. Only use after the user explicitly confirms. Ask the confirmation question right after the prompt.

core-foundation.displayName: DB UX DS v3 - Core Foundation - v4.13.0
core-foundation.usage: All Figma Variables / tokens: colors, spacing, typography, radius, sizing, elevation. Bind everything from here.

theme-icons.displayName: DB UX DS v3 - DB Theme Icons - v3.9.1
theme-icons.usage: Functional UI icons (e.g. inside buttons, nav, inputs). Use these for any icon that is part of a UI element. Never substitute emoji for UI icons.

theme-illustrative-icons.displayName: DB UX DS v3 - DB Theme Illustrative Icons - v3.3.0
theme-illustrative-icons.usage: Illustrative / decorative icons used as CONTENT, not as UI element icons. Do not use for buttons, inputs, nav, etc.

core-patterns.displayName: DB UX DS v3 - Core Patterns - v4.13.0
core-patterns.usage: Currently contains only the Focus State. Can be neglected for normal screen generation.
